raw_data.subtypes: Health food store, Grocery store, Organic food store, Supermarket

reviews_data.review_text: Nice healthier food options

I just moved to the area and was excited to be close to an Earth Fare. This is the worse Earth Fare I’ve ever been in. Employees are rude, line is always long with one person working register, produce is moldy.. I can never find anyone to help me without chasing someone down or going to the front to ask someone. I’d rather drive 20 mins to the rock hill location than walk across the street to go here.
I love the creamy tomato soup. Literally CRAVE it! So good w a sourdough grilled cheese sandwich.
Great store.
Overpriced

The hot bar used the be on point when the older gentlemen ran it . NOW it is horrid.  And to see an employee behind the food preparation station eating .Maybe it was leftovers not sure but a turn off for me. I will stick with Whole foods hot bar. Always clean and the food is fresh
Meat counter was good person at checkout was not happy helpful or friendly
I keep wanting to like this place, but how many times can I buy old food or expired food? Such a great location for Whole Foods
Surf and Turf Saturdays!

reviews_data.owner_answer: We apologize for your experience. Fresh and healthy foods are the foundation of our mission and values. Our goal is to make it accessible for everyone. Please know we hear you and will take proper steps to ensure a delicious fresh hot bar for you on your next visit!
reviews_data.review_text: Too bad a store with so much potential would sell “food” this disgusting. Pro-tip: if you can’t manage fresh food on a hot bar simply remove it and focus on what you can do.
They don’t answer the phone terrible customer service
Love this place! Lori In the deli is great. She helped me with my Thanksgiving meal that I buy every year from Earthfare. It’s so good that I drive from Mint Hill to Fort Mill to pick it up.
Such a sad thing. The hot bar and cold bar were yucky! Turkey all dried up and sweet potatoes were strange. For a health store they do not know what they are doing.
They still offer good products like in the old days.
They always have what I need. My vegeneise with the purple top. No one else carries it. Staff is always friendly.
Great Pizza and wings already cooked
Pretty good natural food store, was looking for some stuff that's been harder to find since 2020 and found some there

We've been longtime EarthFare customers, and in more than one state. Today, we were shopping in the meat department for "fresh" grass-fed ground beef and bought some.

Once home, we unwrapped it and found what you see in the attached photos—it looks like the "fresh" red meat had been wrapped around a core of old brownish-gray meat (which actually smelled). How else could the old meat be inside the new meat?

We opened the second package of meat this morning and found the same thing (see the additional 3 pics). This can't be by accident.

It seems the meat department needs serious remedial training in safety policies and health practices (at least). Customers could become ill if they didn't spot this before making hamburgers.

Very disappointing, to say the least, for a store that prides itself on organics, on product quality, and, from its own marketing, on a commitment to ethical management practices.

By the way, before posting this here, we went to the EarthFare website but could find no information for customers to contact the company or even provide feedback—apparently you're left dealing with a local store in person or by phone only, which is astounding in 2025.

P.S. I had to hit a single star instead of the zero (0) which was merited here.

A little more expensive compared to Trader Joe's.
Exceptional shopping experience,  slow paced and less busy than Trader Joe's.
I always love coming here. The food is always fresh and delicious.

Has a good selection of natural and healthier for you products. Also, has a good selection of whole body care. It's comparable to a whole foods or sprouts. I love that they have a water purifier, so you can get refills with your own water jugs.
Very nice, I'll go back soon for sure.
Great sale prices for healthy fresh food.
They always have amazing products and produce. We’re never disappointed!
If you've been in one Earth Fare you've been in them all.
The lady who works in the kitchen with the nose ring was really kind and helpful!!
Great organic store

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Terry, thank you for your post. Our store hours for Fort Mill are 8AM-9PM which are stated on google. Thanks again, we appreciate you shopping with us!
reviews_data.review_text: Please please update  your google and website to state your TRUE hours of operation. Your store seemingly does not mind inconveniencing their customers time after they drive there to find the store closed after googling the store hours. Please fix this .
Love this store, so many great options and variety of fresh foods. This is my only grocery now.
Their prices are ridiculously inflated, will not be returning

Earthfare fan for years. I travel for work and visit as many earthfares as I can. This earthfare was of the most disappointing. 10:30am on Thursday and no hot bar. Two sandwiches to choice from. No pizza. Doors missing on the refrigerators. Everything is on sale and old. So either the investors don't care or they are doing a terrible job marketing and getting foot traffic through them doors. Literally ended up not getting any food it was so disappointing. A better job can be done here. Its hurting earthfares image more then anything else.

If I could give 0 stars I would. I’ve been trying it out for the past 2 months a I keep getting disappointed more and more. That’s my money gone to the trash because of expired products that I’ve bought, produce that is rotten or bakery items that are hard & stale. You’d expect them to be attentive to what they’re selling. This spoiled coffee that I bought today and took a sip of was my last straw.

Out of advertised fish and meat on a regular basis.
Newly opened Sprouts down the street is MUCH better
Wonderful selection of organic food. O bought salmon and it was incredibly fresh. And the price was really not that bad. It’s actually cheaper than public. I plan on shopping here more often.

Just left the store. No one greeted me when I walked in. There was one register open and then another opened. That person didn’t even announce she was open. On top of that while I was waiting there was a little boy with his mom touching the end cap of the register. While he was putting the glee gum back he sneezed on everything. Mom just looked at everyone and then went and grabbed the first packet of gum and stated you really wanted the gum. The boy replied nothing came out when I sneezed. The cashier didn’t say anything nobody went to disinfect the area. It was completely ignored while I was at the store. The man behind me tapped and let me know the other register was open.
Older perishables, costumer svc avg at best
Excellent choices, just need to be more friendly!!!

Nice store.  Love their large coconut green lentil soup for 10.00.  A great take home treat when the weather gets cold.  We also like their single serving meals and  fresh fish in cooking bags with veggies and herb seasonings for 6.99.
Great place to shop!
Always friendly.  Monday is 10% for seniors!
Some places seem to have no concept of what it takes to stay in business. Add this grocery store to the list. How many times have this company changed ownerships already? But they still don't get it.
Expensive!
Was surprised at how competitive their prices were. The staff was very friendly. Very clean. Open. Easy to find stuff.
Great selection and service
Beautiful relatively new store, all the goodies!

I love Earth Fare, glad there are still a few remaining. The store itself is very well stocked and clean! I was unamused with the cashier Anja she got an attitude when I approached her line to checkout I guess because she had to stop digging under her nails to do her job. I did not say anything nor was anything said to me, I was rushed through the transaction she even skipped the screen to input rewards number while I was typing it in. After my transaction was completed she hesitated to hand me my receipt and mad sure to try to touch the least amount possible as if it was a problem to handle it to me normally.
One the last remaining Earth Fare locations! FYI they start closing down the bakery and meat section around 6pm. Food is fresh and mostly organic so the prices are higher. Staff are friendly.
3 Dollar Burgers are top NOTCH!!!!
Great selection of unique and trendy food/drinks. Everything was very fresh and the staff were very friendly and welcoming.

Earth Fare has pros and cons… Amy the specialty manager is a pro for Earth Fare. She makes your fresh juice with so much love. She’s absolutely amazing!  The vegan mock tuna is a con. It tastes like someone poured a cup of salt in it. If you’re on a low sodium diet, don’t eat this.
Love shopping here
The food is over priced never fresh and the workers are rude. Shut it down and put up a Trader Joe’s please. This Earth Fare sucks

This review is for the meat department specifically Bradley! I ask for specific amount and he just gave me what he wanted to and not what I asked for. He doesnt weigh out or cut meat properly.  This has been on going for over a year at least. He shouldn't be working in the meat department. Why is he still there? I have read other reviews complaining about him as well.

Well, it’s fine. Overpriced pantry items. Overpriced produce with sadly not an amazing selection. The produce section is smallish yet at a health food store, it should be the focus. Good bulk items including some you don’t usually see: different candies, chocolate covered nuts, raspberry yogurt covered pretzels which were really good, and decaf whole bean coffee which can be hard to find. Good cheese selection (although expensive) and VERY helpful and knowledgeable woman working at the cheese section. Good meat and seafood selection with actually not terrible prices compared to the rest of the store.

I love this place.  I go when I can and need some natural medicine.
But, the fresh food is overpriced. Doesn't matter what area of town they're in, they charge $2 more for all the bread loafs. I like their natural/homeopathic pharmacy. I go for that. I wish I didn't spend $ on their hot food bar. It was towards the end of the night and the food was pretty underwhelming. Asian food with no rice or noodles. Just meet and vegetables. Did not taste good. The cash register clerk forgot to give me my receipt so I don't even know how much they charged me for the hot food.
Manager was extremely rude about a  return.

For a store that projects as health store, the produce section is extremely small and most of the veggies were stale.
Everything else is astronomically priced. Why would anyone come over for overpriced, not so fresh groceries?
Very few staff available and none of them have been trained to be a little more pleasant and welcoming.

The 2 stars are for the hot food counter. At least that food looked fresh and welcoming.

Unimpressive, won't be going back again!
Way better then the fresh market.

My family and I love coming here. We love the daily deals and our favorites to hit up is the deli food and the food bars! We also love the meat department’s chicken and hamburger! I have one request that I wish they would improve on, they took off of the olive bar my favorite olives - the buttery Castelveltrano olives as well as the grilled artichokes. Please put them back and I will be the happiest customer ever!
Very disappointed with Earth fare, same products the price is higher than Whole food grocery store, also less fresh ! Whole food much better quality and price.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello Wendy,  Thank you so much for sharing your feedback with us.
reviews_data.review_text: Very disappointed, small compared to their other locations.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello Matt...  Thank you so much for sharing your feedback with us. So sorry that you've had negative experiences at our Baxter location.  Your feedback has been shared with the store team.
reviews_data.review_text:
It's really disappointing how bad this location has been since the bankruptcy. I was a regular customer before the shut-down, and was excited for it to re-open when it did. But it's... just bad now. The fresh bakery is abandoned and unused. The hot bar food always looks gross and sad. Cheese section had lots of moldy cheeses which shouldn't be moldy. Things are out of stock. For example, they were out of bulk steel-cut oatmeal last week. I asked when more would come in; I was told Thursday. Went there yesterday and there still wasn't any.

Speaking of which, there are noticeably fewer employees. It seems like nobody goes there now because... well, nobody goes there. The original store was vibrant. The current one is just depressing. It's a real shame, because I want to like the place. I despise HT, and Publix is a bit of a haul. But I give up, I just can't go here anymore. I guess cost-cutting was necessary, but it truly ruined the store.
Worst produce section I've ever seen in a grocery store.
Always have a good experience at this store and they have a variety of organic products in in search of
Jeremy is the best cashier, he’s so friendly! The store is also very clean, and they offer a nice variety of selections.

2021 edit: this store re-opened happily--wish the North Carolina store on Tryon would re-open but doesn't look like it
Am happy to have an Earth Fare so close to us. Employees are very good and walk you to item you can't find. Currently disappointed that gluten-free baked good items are hard to find,  hope this is temporary.
An earlier negative comment about sale prices not ringing correctly: I experienced this in Nov-Dec 2019 but seems to be fixed now.

I had such a wonderful customer service experience recently thanks to Sasha!! She was so kind and helpful and really made my day! I was shopping with a toddler and her assistance was extremely helpful! Now I have 2 favorite employees I look forward to seeing when I’m out shopping, Jean and Sasha! You’re the best!
Sasha makes this place special!  She actually cares about people and goes above and beyond to answer any of your questions.  Great store with a great human being working there!
Sasha in the health food section really knows her stuff. She helped me make educated choices on supplements and can explain the differences between brands. A big help!
Love this place I’m so happy they reopened this location.. Guys in the butcher department are great as always.
Went today. Store seems like half full. Staff wasn't around. Got crab cakes and they tasted very off and not fresh :(

I walked in this morning. No one greeted me. I headed towards smoothie area no one acknowledge me for 5mins I waited for assistance. Two employees at their registers laugh, talks but NO! assistance from them. They both watched me stand at the smoothie counter still waiting. Finally a gentlemen gets the attention from someone in bakery, she walks over says this is not my area and goes off to find someone to make me a smoothie. I waited, waited! No one came. So I left. Bad experience at an high end store. Poor management. There always needs to be someone assisting the customers
It is no longer in business.closed
I just went there to check it out, Google maps shows they’re open and they are closed! They should’ve thought about that before closing
Lot of organics options and open late than others till 11 pm.

I absolutely love EarthFare but I must this particular location lack great customer service
I always get great service at The Rock Hill and Rivergate location. But why travel that far if I live right near to this location.
What I hate is the sales never adjust at the register so you have to carefully monitor as they are scanning.
The corn were on sale, so just to be sure I had the correct corn I asked the produce clerk as he were filling up the corn. Get to my car and that wasn’t the correct corn, so I took my receipt back in there and they were like no, that’s the wrong corn.
So they didn’t apologize for the miscommunication, never did they say don’t worry we will honor the price for the inconvenience. They made me go back and get the corn from my car, very disappointing and shocking! The supposedly TEAM LEADER Angel, well she was the one that could have turned this around.
Angel you will never survive in the customer service area, you were very nasty about the whole situation. But thanks for your rude customer service
I got all the groceries I purchased and RETURNED everything SINGLE item, walked out there heading to Harris Teeter.
Love Earth Fare.  They make it easy to eat healthy at reasonable prices.  This store is a great size so you can purchase your groceries and get out quick!
Good selection of healthy food
Very bad customer service. Left a note to order bulk oats and never called back.  This is not the first time.
Love the Earth fare

Clean, good variety of products
Been impressed with everything I've bought there
Really great, fresh food. Lives up to tgeor expecations and promises. Tho it is more expensive
The meat department has a great selection at reasonable prices.  Plenty of organic produce, but you have to pay attention to the quality of the fruits/veggies you pick up and put in your cart.
My favorite store. Healthy food of all sorts. They bake their own bread which is our breakfast staple. Their meats are high quality.
My favorite place to shop. Good prices and quality products
High priced but great organic selection
Lots of organic, non gmo, etc.

Great non-GMO food items that you can feel good about. Vegan or not it's a good healthy food options. They also have wines, fresh and dried herbs, hot and cold bar. Plus they make fresh juice!!! Eat healthy enjoy a longer-life!
I love Earth Fare.

We have one in Jacksonville, FL and this one is a mirror image of that one. Grass fed beef, Non-GMO products, fairly decent fresh fish selection, sandwiches, pizzas, cheese and wine as well as a variety of organic H&BA products. Cooked chickens, beer, hot foods, soups,  and fresh produce.

I love their Grassfed Beef. The steaks are excellent! Usually Grassfed is stringy and tough, but theirs is excellent!  Also they frequently have sales, so I save money over publix and certainly over Harris Teeter! Go earthfare!
Give them a minute to iron out the kinks.... great store
I love fresh foods. Great place for groceries and vegetables.
Awesome Orgainc!!!!!
Though little expensive, I do shop for organic stuff that are difficult to get from other places.

I encountered about 8 employees in this store (my first visit ever to an Earth Fare) and the only one who was half-way nice was the cashier. When I walked into the store, there was a person putting produce out. He looked up, I smiled and said hello. He looked up, said nothing, and put his head down. Then there was a stock person (?) pushing a cart with boxes on it down an aisle. I was going to go up that aisle but when I saw him, I stopped so he could proceed without me getting in the way. I smiled at him, he said nothing. I found the prices to be more expensive for the same items I've purchased at Publix and while I was excited that an Earth Far was opening soon very near my home, I'm no longer interested in shopping there.  Wish it was going to be a Trader Joe's instead. People there (and at Publix) are always warm, welcoming and friendly.
Very slow checkout, but good juice
Fresh as public but price is higher
Great Store for Health Food good variety of none GMO.
Great fresh, natural food. Good meat alternatives (if you're into that). Great beer selection!
Great grocery store. The best around! Get the app!

As far as I've seen most of all products are a little bit more expensive than any other supermarket prices. But, this store is a 5-star (I would say) quality, clean, and nice place to stop by and shop ORGANIC products. (TRY ALL DESSERTS, THEY ARE SO FREAKING GOOD!)
It's an okay grocery store.  I would shop elsewhere.  I don't feel like I get good value when I shop here.
My new favorite grocery store. Pleasant employees,  fair prices,  wholesome foods. Close and convenient.
Brand new store.  What's not to like?

Cashiers are friendly. Asked for assistance in produce an gentleman stocking not healthful with me asking for assistance to determine if mango fruit ripe. Stated he didn't know, just kept working as if knowing not part of his job description so I will return to Rock Hill location when buying fruit. Loved cleanliness of location, how well organized.
Young lady in the Bakery, dark hair, glasses, green Old Navy sweatshirt - needs to go back to Customer Service 101.

I may never cook again!  Between their weeknight meal specials, the salad bar and the hot food bar, I am totally covered for a healthy dinner, for the family....esp. on those crazy carpool, sports nights!
I like the staff the organic products the lay out of the store. It is a treat to eat and shop there.

Wow!  THE place to shop for fresh, quality food.  Used to say this about Whole Foods too but Earthfare remains superior.
Take care of your health & spend $ on good food rather than eating contaminated bad food and paying a high price with your health when you get sick.
Great organic food at great prices. Plus they have the best prices on grass fed beef.
Amazing
No free samples, this is not Harris Teeter, but the price is high.

This was my first visit so I was browsing. The produce was mixed in quality typical of most stores. Some prices seemed high but there were numerous sales to take advantage of. They have a huge deli with prepared take out foods. The olive bar was great. The baked goods looked yummy. They also have a large selection of seafood.
Exelente
A great store offering options for people with dietary restrictions as well as people who like to shop for products without harmful ingredients found in most brands.
I love my store.  Fun people  great customers
Just left this location... Nice store it just opened a few days ago.

After a pleasant shopping experience at the new Earth Fare today I was very disappointed to get to the park with my babies for a picnic and discovered my sandwich was old (past sell by date) and absolutely HORRIBLE. Had to throw it away.  At least mark it down.  Won’t be buying a sandwich from them again.

We went during their grand opening and I say it was a success. Parking was tough and inside was elbow to elbow. Very nice craft beer and wine section although I don’t remember seeing regular beer. Good butcher shop and a very nice deli section. I’d say the other two high end grocery stores have a new competitor.

Looks great, fantastic amount of help. It was the grand opening, so plenty of staff on hand and they gave the first 500 shoppers a gift card and free bag. They offered samples of products, allowed people to try food from the hot bar before buying and had a fire truck opened up as part of the celebration. Good sizedstore and lots of paleo, gluten free and keto options as expected from an Earth Fare. Huge cheese selection. Offered some good deals - dont know how much is grand opening vs weekly specials.

I got invited to the preview part tonight (they open tomorrow). It was pretty cool. There were tons of free samples.

Everything we had was definitely really good. The prices we saw were also pretty expensive. I'm not sure the quality difference justifies the expense for me personally.

It was definitely a nice store and if you're looking for an organic grocery store, I would recommend it.

reviews_data.review_text: Nice healthier food options

I just moved to the area and was excited to be close to an Earth Fare. This is the worse Earth Fare I’ve ever been in. Employees are rude, line is always long with one person working register, produce is moldy.. I can never find anyone to help me without chasing someone down or going to the front to ask someone. I’d rather drive 20 mins to the rock hill location than walk across the street to go here.
I love the creamy tomato soup. Literally CRAVE it! So good w a sourdough grilled cheese sandwich.
Great store.
Overpriced

The hot bar used the be on point when the older gentlemen ran it . NOW it is horrid.  And to see an employee behind the food preparation station eating .Maybe it was leftovers not sure but a turn off for me. I will stick with Whole foods hot bar. Always clean and the food is fresh
Meat counter was good person at checkout was not happy helpful or friendly
I keep wanting to like this place, but how many times can I buy old food or expired food? Such a great location for Whole Foods
Surf and Turf Saturdays!

reviews_data.owner_answer: We apologize for your experience. Fresh and healthy foods are the foundation of our mission and values. Our goal is to make it accessible for everyone. Please know we hear you and will take proper steps to ensure a delicious fresh hot bar for you on your next visit!
reviews_data.review_text: Too bad a store with so much potential would sell “food” this disgusting. Pro-tip: if you can’t manage fresh food on a hot bar simply remove it and focus on what you can do.
They don’t answer the phone terrible customer service
Love this place! Lori In the deli is great. She helped me with my Thanksgiving meal that I buy every year from Earthfare. It’s so good that I drive from Mint Hill to Fort Mill to pick it up.
Such a sad thing. The hot bar and cold bar were yucky! Turkey all dried up and sweet potatoes were strange. For a health store they do not know what they are doing.
They still offer good products like in the old days.
They always have what I need. My vegeneise with the purple top. No one else carries it. Staff is always friendly.
Great Pizza and wings already cooked
Pretty good natural food store, was looking for some stuff that's been harder to find since 2020 and found some there

We've been longtime EarthFare customers, and in more than one state. Today, we were shopping in the meat department for "fresh" grass-fed ground beef and bought some.

Once home, we unwrapped it and found what you see in the attached photos—it looks like the "fresh" red meat had been wrapped around a core of old brownish-gray meat (which actually smelled). How else could the old meat be inside the new meat?

We opened the second package of meat this morning and found the same thing (see the additional 3 pics). This can't be by accident.

It seems the meat department needs serious remedial training in safety policies and health practices (at least). Customers could become ill if they didn't spot this before making hamburgers.

Very disappointing, to say the least, for a store that prides itself on organics, on product quality, and, from its own marketing, on a commitment to ethical management practices.

By the way, before posting this here, we went to the EarthFare website but could find no information for customers to contact the company or even provide feedback—apparently you're left dealing with a local store in person or by phone only, which is astounding in 2025.

P.S. I had to hit a single star instead of the zero (0) which was merited here.

A little more expensive compared to Trader Joe's.
Exceptional shopping experience,  slow paced and less busy than Trader Joe's.
I always love coming here. The food is always fresh and delicious.

Has a good selection of natural and healthier for you products. Also, has a good selection of whole body care. It's comparable to a whole foods or sprouts. I love that they have a water purifier, so you can get refills with your own water jugs.
Very nice, I'll go back soon for sure.
Great sale prices for healthy fresh food.
They always have amazing products and produce. We’re never disappointed!
If you've been in one Earth Fare you've been in them all.
The lady who works in the kitchen with the nose ring was really kind and helpful!!
Great organic store

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Terry, thank you for your post. Our store hours for Fort Mill are 8AM-9PM which are stated on google. Thanks again, we appreciate you shopping with us!
reviews_data.review_text: Please please update  your google and website to state your TRUE hours of operation. Your store seemingly does not mind inconveniencing their customers time after they drive there to find the store closed after googling the store hours. Please fix this .
Love this store, so many great options and variety of fresh foods. This is my only grocery now.
Their prices are ridiculously inflated, will not be returning

Earthfare fan for years. I travel for work and visit as many earthfares as I can. This earthfare was of the most disappointing. 10:30am on Thursday and no hot bar. Two sandwiches to choice from. No pizza. Doors missing on the refrigerators. Everything is on sale and old. So either the investors don't care or they are doing a terrible job marketing and getting foot traffic through them doors. Literally ended up not getting any food it was so disappointing. A better job can be done here. Its hurting earthfares image more then anything else.

If I could give 0 stars I would. I’ve been trying it out for the past 2 months a I keep getting disappointed more and more. That’s my money gone to the trash because of expired products that I’ve bought, produce that is rotten or bakery items that are hard & stale. You’d expect them to be attentive to what they’re selling. This spoiled coffee that I bought today and took a sip of was my last straw.

Out of advertised fish and meat on a regular basis.
Newly opened Sprouts down the street is MUCH better
Wonderful selection of organic food. O bought salmon and it was incredibly fresh. And the price was really not that bad. It’s actually cheaper than public. I plan on shopping here more often.

Just left the store. No one greeted me when I walked in. There was one register open and then another opened. That person didn’t even announce she was open. On top of that while I was waiting there was a little boy with his mom touching the end cap of the register. While he was putting the glee gum back he sneezed on everything. Mom just looked at everyone and then went and grabbed the first packet of gum and stated you really wanted the gum. The boy replied nothing came out when I sneezed. The cashier didn’t say anything nobody went to disinfect the area. It was completely ignored while I was at the store. The man behind me tapped and let me know the other register was open.
Older perishables, costumer svc avg at best
Excellent choices, just need to be more friendly!!!

Nice store.  Love their large coconut green lentil soup for 10.00.  A great take home treat when the weather gets cold.  We also like their single serving meals and  fresh fish in cooking bags with veggies and herb seasonings for 6.99.
Great place to shop!
Always friendly.  Monday is 10% for seniors!
Some places seem to have no concept of what it takes to stay in business. Add this grocery store to the list. How many times have this company changed ownerships already? But they still don't get it.
Expensive!
Was surprised at how competitive their prices were. The staff was very friendly. Very clean. Open. Easy to find stuff.
Great selection and service
Beautiful relatively new store, all the goodies!

I love Earth Fare, glad there are still a few remaining. The store itself is very well stocked and clean! I was unamused with the cashier Anja she got an attitude when I approached her line to checkout I guess because she had to stop digging under her nails to do her job. I did not say anything nor was anything said to me, I was rushed through the transaction she even skipped the screen to input rewards number while I was typing it in. After my transaction was completed she hesitated to hand me my receipt and mad sure to try to touch the least amount possible as if it was a problem to handle it to me normally.
One the last remaining Earth Fare locations! FYI they start closing down the bakery and meat section around 6pm. Food is fresh and mostly organic so the prices are higher. Staff are friendly.
3 Dollar Burgers are top NOTCH!!!!
Great selection of unique and trendy food/drinks. Everything was very fresh and the staff were very friendly and welcoming.

Earth Fare has pros and cons… Amy the specialty manager is a pro for Earth Fare. She makes your fresh juice with so much love. She’s absolutely amazing!  The vegan mock tuna is a con. It tastes like someone poured a cup of salt in it. If you’re on a low sodium diet, don’t eat this.
Love shopping here
The food is over priced never fresh and the workers are rude. Shut it down and put up a Trader Joe’s please. This Earth Fare sucks

This review is for the meat department specifically Bradley! I ask for specific amount and he just gave me what he wanted to and not what I asked for. He doesnt weigh out or cut meat properly.  This has been on going for over a year at least. He shouldn't be working in the meat department. Why is he still there? I have read other reviews complaining about him as well.

Well, it’s fine. Overpriced pantry items. Overpriced produce with sadly not an amazing selection. The produce section is smallish yet at a health food store, it should be the focus. Good bulk items including some you don’t usually see: different candies, chocolate covered nuts, raspberry yogurt covered pretzels which were really good, and decaf whole bean coffee which can be hard to find. Good cheese selection (although expensive) and VERY helpful and knowledgeable woman working at the cheese section. Good meat and seafood selection with actually not terrible prices compared to the rest of the store.

I love this place.  I go when I can and need some natural medicine.
But, the fresh food is overpriced. Doesn't matter what area of town they're in, they charge $2 more for all the bread loafs. I like their natural/homeopathic pharmacy. I go for that. I wish I didn't spend $ on their hot food bar. It was towards the end of the night and the food was pretty underwhelming. Asian food with no rice or noodles. Just meet and vegetables. Did not taste good. The cash register clerk forgot to give me my receipt so I don't even know how much they charged me for the hot food.
Manager was extremely rude about a  return.

For a store that projects as health store, the produce section is extremely small and most of the veggies were stale.
Everything else is astronomically priced. Why would anyone come over for overpriced, not so fresh groceries?
Very few staff available and none of them have been trained to be a little more pleasant and welcoming.

The 2 stars are for the hot food counter. At least that food looked fresh and welcoming.

Unimpressive, won't be going back again!
Way better then the fresh market.

My family and I love coming here. We love the daily deals and our favorites to hit up is the deli food and the food bars! We also love the meat department’s chicken and hamburger! I have one request that I wish they would improve on, they took off of the olive bar my favorite olives - the buttery Castelveltrano olives as well as the grilled artichokes. Please put them back and I will be the happiest customer ever!
Very disappointed with Earth fare, same products the price is higher than Whole food grocery store, also less fresh ! Whole food much better quality and price.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello Wendy,  Thank you so much for sharing your feedback with us.
reviews_data.review_text: Very disappointed, small compared to their other locations.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello Matt...  Thank you so much for sharing your feedback with us. So sorry that you've had negative experiences at our Baxter location.  Your feedback has been shared with the store team.
reviews_data.review_text:
It's really disappointing how bad this location has been since the bankruptcy. I was a regular customer before the shut-down, and was excited for it to re-open when it did. But it's... just bad now. The fresh bakery is abandoned and unused. The hot bar food always looks gross and sad. Cheese section had lots of moldy cheeses which shouldn't be moldy. Things are out of stock. For example, they were out of bulk steel-cut oatmeal last week. I asked when more would come in; I was told Thursday. Went there yesterday and there still wasn't any.

Speaking of which, there are noticeably fewer employees. It seems like nobody goes there now because... well, nobody goes there. The original store was vibrant. The current one is just depressing. It's a real shame, because I want to like the place. I despise HT, and Publix is a bit of a haul. But I give up, I just can't go here anymore. I guess cost-cutting was necessary, but it truly ruined the store.
Worst produce section I've ever seen in a grocery store.
Always have a good experience at this store and they have a variety of organic products in in search of
Jeremy is the best cashier, he’s so friendly! The store is also very clean, and they offer a nice variety of selections.

2021 edit: this store re-opened happily--wish the North Carolina store on Tryon would re-open but doesn't look like it
Am happy to have an Earth Fare so close to us. Employees are very good and walk you to item you can't find. Currently disappointed that gluten-free baked good items are hard to find,  hope this is temporary.
An earlier negative comment about sale prices not ringing correctly: I experienced this in Nov-Dec 2019 but seems to be fixed now.

I had such a wonderful customer service experience recently thanks to Sasha!! She was so kind and helpful and really made my day! I was shopping with a toddler and her assistance was extremely helpful! Now I have 2 favorite employees I look forward to seeing when I’m out shopping, Jean and Sasha! You’re the best!
Sasha makes this place special!  She actually cares about people and goes above and beyond to answer any of your questions.  Great store with a great human being working there!
Sasha in the health food section really knows her stuff. She helped me make educated choices on supplements and can explain the differences between brands. A big help!
Love this place I’m so happy they reopened this location.. Guys in the butcher department are great as always.
Went today. Store seems like half full. Staff wasn't around. Got crab cakes and they tasted very off and not fresh :(

I walked in this morning. No one greeted me. I headed towards smoothie area no one acknowledge me for 5mins I waited for assistance. Two employees at their registers laugh, talks but NO! assistance from them. They both watched me stand at the smoothie counter still waiting. Finally a gentlemen gets the attention from someone in bakery, she walks over says this is not my area and goes off to find someone to make me a smoothie. I waited, waited! No one came. So I left. Bad experience at an high end store. Poor management. There always needs to be someone assisting the customers
It is no longer in business.closed
I just went there to check it out, Google maps shows they’re open and they are closed! They should’ve thought about that before closing
Lot of organics options and open late than others till 11 pm.

I absolutely love EarthFare but I must this particular location lack great customer service
I always get great service at The Rock Hill and Rivergate location. But why travel that far if I live right near to this location.
What I hate is the sales never adjust at the register so you have to carefully monitor as they are scanning.
The corn were on sale, so just to be sure I had the correct corn I asked the produce clerk as he were filling up the corn. Get to my car and that wasn’t the correct corn, so I took my receipt back in there and they were like no, that’s the wrong corn.
So they didn’t apologize for the miscommunication, never did they say don’t worry we will honor the price for the inconvenience. They made me go back and get the corn from my car, very disappointing and shocking! The supposedly TEAM LEADER Angel, well she was the one that could have turned this around.
Angel you will never survive in the customer service area, you were very nasty about the whole situation. But thanks for your rude customer service
I got all the groceries I purchased and RETURNED everything SINGLE item, walked out there heading to Harris Teeter.
Love Earth Fare.  They make it easy to eat healthy at reasonable prices.  This store is a great size so you can purchase your groceries and get out quick!
Good selection of healthy food
Very bad customer service. Left a note to order bulk oats and never called back.  This is not the first time.
Love the Earth fare

Clean, good variety of products
Been impressed with everything I've bought there
Really great, fresh food. Lives up to tgeor expecations and promises. Tho it is more expensive
The meat department has a great selection at reasonable prices.  Plenty of organic produce, but you have to pay attention to the quality of the fruits/veggies you pick up and put in your cart.
My favorite store. Healthy food of all sorts. They bake their own bread which is our breakfast staple. Their meats are high quality.
My favorite place to shop. Good prices and quality products
High priced but great organic selection
Lots of organic, non gmo, etc.

Great non-GMO food items that you can feel good about. Vegan or not it's a good healthy food options. They also have wines, fresh and dried herbs, hot and cold bar. Plus they make fresh juice!!! Eat healthy enjoy a longer-life!
I love Earth Fare.

We have one in Jacksonville, FL and this one is a mirror image of that one. Grass fed beef, Non-GMO products, fairly decent fresh fish selection, sandwiches, pizzas, cheese and wine as well as a variety of organic H&BA products. Cooked chickens, beer, hot foods, soups,  and fresh produce.

I love their Grassfed Beef. The steaks are excellent! Usually Grassfed is stringy and tough, but theirs is excellent!  Also they frequently have sales, so I save money over publix and certainly over Harris Teeter! Go earthfare!
Give them a minute to iron out the kinks.... great store
I love fresh foods. Great place for groceries and vegetables.
Awesome Orgainc!!!!!
Though little expensive, I do shop for organic stuff that are difficult to get from other places.

I encountered about 8 employees in this store (my first visit ever to an Earth Fare) and the only one who was half-way nice was the cashier. When I walked into the store, there was a person putting produce out. He looked up, I smiled and said hello. He looked up, said nothing, and put his head down. Then there was a stock person (?) pushing a cart with boxes on it down an aisle. I was going to go up that aisle but when I saw him, I stopped so he could proceed without me getting in the way. I smiled at him, he said nothing. I found the prices to be more expensive for the same items I've purchased at Publix and while I was excited that an Earth Far was opening soon very near my home, I'm no longer interested in shopping there.  Wish it was going to be a Trader Joe's instead. People there (and at Publix) are always warm, welcoming and friendly.
Very slow checkout, but good juice
Fresh as public but price is higher
Great Store for Health Food good variety of none GMO.
Great fresh, natural food. Good meat alternatives (if you're into that). Great beer selection!
Great grocery store. The best around! Get the app!

As far as I've seen most of all products are a little bit more expensive than any other supermarket prices. But, this store is a 5-star (I would say) quality, clean, and nice place to stop by and shop ORGANIC products. (TRY ALL DESSERTS, THEY ARE SO FREAKING GOOD!)
It's an okay grocery store.  I would shop elsewhere.  I don't feel like I get good value when I shop here.
My new favorite grocery store. Pleasant employees,  fair prices,  wholesome foods. Close and convenient.
Brand new store.  What's not to like?

Cashiers are friendly. Asked for assistance in produce an gentleman stocking not healthful with me asking for assistance to determine if mango fruit ripe. Stated he didn't know, just kept working as if knowing not part of his job description so I will return to Rock Hill location when buying fruit. Loved cleanliness of location, how well organized.
Young lady in the Bakery, dark hair, glasses, green Old Navy sweatshirt - needs to go back to Customer Service 101.

I may never cook again!  Between their weeknight meal specials, the salad bar and the hot food bar, I am totally covered for a healthy dinner, for the family....esp. on those crazy carpool, sports nights!
I like the staff the organic products the lay out of the store. It is a treat to eat and shop there.

Wow!  THE place to shop for fresh, quality food.  Used to say this about Whole Foods too but Earthfare remains superior.
Take care of your health & spend $ on good food rather than eating contaminated bad food and paying a high price with your health when you get sick.
Great organic food at great prices. Plus they have the best prices on grass fed beef.
Amazing
No free samples, this is not Harris Teeter, but the price is high.

This was my first visit so I was browsing. The produce was mixed in quality typical of most stores. Some prices seemed high but there were numerous sales to take advantage of. They have a huge deli with prepared take out foods. The olive bar was great. The baked goods looked yummy. They also have a large selection of seafood.
Exelente
A great store offering options for people with dietary restrictions as well as people who like to shop for products without harmful ingredients found in most brands.
I love my store.  Fun people  great customers
Just left this location... Nice store it just opened a few days ago.

After a pleasant shopping experience at the new Earth Fare today I was very disappointed to get to the park with my babies for a picnic and discovered my sandwich was old (past sell by date) and absolutely HORRIBLE. Had to throw it away.  At least mark it down.  Won’t be buying a sandwich from them again.

We went during their grand opening and I say it was a success. Parking was tough and inside was elbow to elbow. Very nice craft beer and wine section although I don’t remember seeing regular beer. Good butcher shop and a very nice deli section. I’d say the other two high end grocery stores have a new competitor.

Looks great, fantastic amount of help. It was the grand opening, so plenty of staff on hand and they gave the first 500 shoppers a gift card and free bag. They offered samples of products, allowed people to try food from the hot bar before buying and had a fire truck opened up as part of the celebration. Good sizedstore and lots of paleo, gluten free and keto options as expected from an Earth Fare. Huge cheese selection. Offered some good deals - dont know how much is grand opening vs weekly specials.

I got invited to the preview part tonight (they open tomorrow). It was pretty cool. There were tons of free samples.

Everything we had was definitely really good. The prices we saw were also pretty expensive. I'm not sure the quality difference justifies the expense for me personally.

It was definitely a nice store and if you're looking for an organic grocery store, I would recommend it.

raw_data.subtypes: Health food store, Grocery store, Organic food store, Supermarket
